title: France Votes to Allow Assisted Dying
summary_full: Lawmakers approved a bill that will allow doctors to help terminally ill patients to die, adding France to a short list of nations that allow the practice.
summary_public: Lawmakers approved a bill that will allow doctors to help terminally ill patients to die, adding France to a short list of nations that allow the practice.

FR.label: positive
FR.evidence: France Votes to Allow Assisted Dying
